arts.ttl: Weather warning puts Liverpool - Manchester United clash at risk - AS USA
arts.sum: Liverpool’s much-anticipated Premier League game against Manchester United is under threat after areas of the north-west of England were put under an amber weather warning on Saturday. If the Manchester United game is postponed too, Liverpool will be facing major fixture congestion in the coming months.

arts.ttl: Man Utd injuries: Every player out of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Every Man Utd player missing from Sunday's trip to Liverpool in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injuries: Every player out of Man Utd clash
arts.sum: The Liverpool players missing from Sunday's clash with Man Utd in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Rashford rejects bumper PAY RISE to leave Man Utd
arts.sum: Rashford announced that he is open to a “new challenge”, effectively putting himself on the transfer market after he was dropped from the Manchester City clash in the Premier League by new head coach Ruben Amorim. Marcus Rashford is becoming an increasingly large problem for Manchester United as the January transfer window progresses.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold contract latest: Liverpool table offer in bid to stop Real Madrid in January transfer window
arts.sum: Liverpool counter Real Madrid's attempt to lure Trent Alexander-Arnold away from Anfield with a new lucrative contract offer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: January window target set to sign for Premier League rival as Arne Slot looks to win title
arts.sum: Liverpool are likely to miss out on a key left-back target to a Premier League rival, as they look to replace veteran Andy Robertson in the near future.

arts.ttl: Liverpool midfielder is targeted by Real Betis for January move with Arne Slot previously insisting the 'very talented' star has a future at Anfield
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Spanish side Real Betis are considering a January move for one of Liverpool's rising stars, despite Arne Slot previously hailing the academy product as a 'very talented player'.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot retains focus on all fronts for visit of fragile Manchester United
arts.sum: Visitors will offer openings to a Liverpool juggling a four-pronged pursuit of glory with speculation about their stars At this stage last season Liverpool had lost once and were top of the Premier League. They scored 12 goals in their first three league games of 2024 to prove their credentials as title challengers before faltering in April and finishing third. They again have an impressive platform but January will test the fortitude of Arne Slot’s side, with eight games in four competitions while the rumour mill churns in the background. A dysfunctional Manchester United arrive on Sunday, 23 points behind Liverpool, desperately hoping that against arguably Europe’s best side they can find a way to halt their run of atrocious performances. Anfield is buoyant after a superb start under Slot but beating a great rival, even one in the doldrums, would take the mood even higher. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits Manchester United struggles have taken toll on him
arts.sum: United will head to Anfield on Sunday on a run of four straight defeats.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'too anxious, too afraid' - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United's players are sometimes "too anxious, too afraid to play football" on the pitch, says boss Ruben Amorim.
